Hero.title: Multilingual QR Menus for Modern Restaurants
Hero.subtitle: Create AI-translated digital menus with custom subdomains, beautiful templates and unlimited scans. Free plan available — go live in minutes.

Features.eyebrow: Everything you need to ship a digital menu in minutes
Features.title: Key features of our menu solution

domain.title: Personalized QR Menu Domain
domain.description: Combine your brand with one of 20+ short domains to create a unique subdomain — your personal web address for your QR menu page.

management.title: Easy Online Menu Management
management.description: Add, sort and edit items with intuitive controls. Our AI photo-parsing assistant builds your menu from images for a fast start.

analytics.title: Online Menu Analytics
analytics.description: Real-time charts of QR scans and menu views, with rankings by language, device and returning visitors.

templates.title: Flexible Templates
templates.description: Multiple design templates, fully customizable. Change colors, fonts and backgrounds to match your brand.

multilingual.title: Multilingual Online Menu
multilingual.description: Auto-translated by AI trained on culinary context. Enable or disable languages anytime and fine-tune any translation manually.

media.title: Media Asset & Global CDN
media.description: Distributed storage with global CDN. Each image is prepared in WebP and responsive variants for every device.

currency.title: Multi-Currency Menu
currency.description: Show prices in multiple currencies at once. Add several prices per dish for portions, sizes or alternative currencies.

qr.title: QR Code Menu Generator
qr.description: Built-in QR generator with logo, colors and styles. Download print-ready PNG, SVG or PDF files.

Templates.title: Menu designs & templates
Templates.subtitle: Explore how your QR menu can look across multiple templates.

items.title: Continuous innovation

items.title: Registration
items.description: Sign up, choose a plan and add a payment method for a monthly subscription.

items.title: Create business page

items.title: Generate & print QR code
items.description: Generate a QR code and print it on any surface in your venue so customers can easily scan it.

Pricing.title: Flexible pricing plans
Pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade anytime. No hidden fees.

items.q: What is a digital QR menu?
items.a: A digital QR menu is an online version of your restaurant menu accessible by scanning a QR code. Customers view it on their mobile devices.

items.q: How much does the subscription cost?
items.a: Menuly offers a Free plan with up to 25 items, unlimited traffic and no ads. Standard plans start at €9.99/month with extended capacity and advanced features.

items.q: Can I use my own subdomain?
items.a: Yes — pick a unique slug under one of our short domains (e.g. 'cafe.menuly.app') for an elegant, easy-to-remember address.
Absolutely. Your menu is automatically translated into the languages you enable, and you can manually adjust translations anytime.
Yes, you have full control. Choose from responsive templates and customize fonts, colors and images to match your brand.

items.q: Is there a limit on views or traffic?
items.a: No limits. Every plan includes unlimited views, scans and interactions with no extra charges.

items.q: What happens if I stop my subscription?
items.a: Your menu stays online for a grace period. After that, your subdomain becomes available again.
Listing allergens helps guests avoid harmful ingredients. Some templates allow filtering items by allergen.

items.q: Can I change my domain later?
items.a: Yes — anytime. Note that previously printed QR codes will still point to the old domain, so you'll need to print new ones.

items.q: Can I create multiple QR codes?
items.a: Yes, unlimited. Customize colors, logos and styles. All QR codes lead to your resource page.
